p.c: exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and not is_eps_adherent_to_set(s, x, k0) }
let w0: Real satisfy { w0.is_positive and not is_eps_adherent_to_set(s, x, w0) }
w0.is_positive
not is_eps_adherent_to_set(s, x, w0)
function(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or is_eps_adherent_to_set(s, x, x0) }(w0)

goal: exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x0: Real) { x0.is_close(x, k0) implies t.contains(x0) } }

p.c: function(x0: Set[Real], x1: Real) { (x1 ∈ x0 and exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x2: Real) { not x2.is_close(x1, k0) or x2 ∈ x0 } }) = is_interior_point(x0, x1) }(t, x)
not is_interior_point(t, x) or (x ∈ t and exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, k0) or x0 ∈ t } })
not is_interior_point(t, x) or x ∈ t
not is_interior_point(t, x) or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, k0) or x0 ∈ t } }
not (x ∈ t and exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, k0) or x0 ∈ t } }) or is_interior_point(t, x)
not exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, k0) or x0 ∈ t } } or not x ∈ t or is_interior_point(t, x)
(forall(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and forall(x1: Real) { not x1.is_close(x, x0) or x1 ∈ t }) or not x ∈ t or is_interior_point(t, x) })
(forall(x0: Real) { not forall(x1: Real) { not x1.is_close(x, x0) or x1 ∈ t } or not x ∈ t or not x0.is_positive or is_interior_point(t, x) })
(forall(x0: Real) { not x ∈ t or not x0.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_close(x, x0) and not k0 ∈ t } or is_interior_point(t, x) })

goal: exists(k0: Real) { s.difference(t).contains(k0) and k0.is_close(x, eps) }

p.c: function(x0: Set[Real], x1: Real, x2: Real) { not is_eps_adherent_to_set(x0, x1, x2) or exists(k0: Real) { k0 ∈ x0 and k0.is_close(x1, x2) } }(s ∖ t, x, eps)
y.is_close(x, eps)
(forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, eps) or x0 ∈ t } = true)
function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_close(x, eps) and not x0 ∈ t) }(y)
not y.is_close(x, eps) or y ∈ t
function(x0: Set[Real]) { forall(x1: Real) { not is_adherent_point_of_set(x0, x1) or x1 ∈ x0 } = is_closed_set(x0) }(s ∖ t)
not is_closed_set(s ∖ t) or forall(x0: Real) { not is_adherent_point_of_set(s ∖ t, x0) or x0 ∈ s ∖ t } = true
(forall(x0: Real) { not (is_adherent_point_of_set(s ∖ t, x0) and not x0 ∈ s ∖ t) or not is_closed_set(s ∖ t) })
(forall(x0: Real) { not is_closed_set(s ∖ t) or not is_adherent_point_of_set(s ∖ t, x0) or x0 ∈ s ∖ t })
not forall(x0: Real) { not is_adherent_point_of_set(s ∖ t, x0) or x0 ∈ s ∖ t } or is_closed_set(s ∖ t)
exists(k0: Real) { is_adherent_point_of_set(s ∖ t, k0) and not k0 ∈ s ∖ t } or is_closed_set(s ∖ t)
exists(k0: Real) { is_adherent_point_of_set(s ∖ t, k0) and not k0 ∈ s ∖ t }
let w0: Real satisfy { is_adherent_point_of_set(s ∖ t, w0) and not w0 ∈ s ∖ t }
is_adherent_point_of_set(s ∖ t, w0)
not w0 ∈ s ∖ t
function(x0: Real) { not is_adherent_point_of_set(s ∖ t, x0) or x0 ∈ s ∖ t }(w0)
